### install foundry-rs/forge-std
```shell
$ forge install foundry-rs/forge-std --no-commit --no-git
```
### install openzeppelin-contracts
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts  --no-git
```

### install openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable  --no-git
```

### deploy 
```shell
$ forge script script/Deploy.s.sol -vvv --rpc-url=https://bsc.blockrazor.xyz --broadcast --private-key=[privateKey]
```



### build router constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(address,address,address,address)" 0xECd96a0903733D981Af6097B852987CD9bB2B551  0x1Ac96C40C5Fbe8AF2f9883d513da87D7CB421f6C 0xB3635d7b53c7349577745b9d045040d401dD3Da5 0x153bB8E0E6b2fC7326c4Db9172d05b6e5f3BB98C
```
### verify router contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x5E6a5B2B0029b9D240aa8821121e3c246c91BA47 src/Router.sol:Router  --constructor-args 0x000000000000000000000000ecd96a0903733d981af6097b852987cd9bb2b5510000000000000000000000001ac96c40c5fbe8af2f9883d513da87d7cb421f6c000000000000000000000000b3635d7b53c7349577745b9d045040d401dd3da5000000000000000000000000153bb8e0e6b2fc7326c4db9172d05b6e5f3bb98c --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build lex constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEX" "LEX" 0xc263D128DdbA54405edDD34C059aD6F342a42a05 0x9990815e5c32F0c1ff2fc7746b3f448cc35B40A3 0x153bB8E0E6b2fC7326c4Db9172d05b6e5f3BB98C
```

### verify lex contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x9994dDf98fDb172E3d56826918538806b2166955 src/token/Lex.sol:Lex  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build leo constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEO" "LEO" 0xc263D128DdbA54405edDD34C059aD6F342a42a05 0xBF69aC91b3F0022e3335062824DC64a5Fc3Ab24C 0x153bB8E0E6b2fC7326c4Db9172d05b6e5f3BB98C

```

### verify leo contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x128676c1Cc1F89d288bF96a43e38Ace0E4674ff0 src/token/Leo.sol:Leo  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```
